name: claude-openproject-ops
description: Marketplace for the claude-openproject-ops plugin: a multi-role agent toolkit for self-hosted OpenProject (certified PM/Scrum + DevOps + lifecycle driver), reachable over a2adapt.

plugins.name: claude-openproject-ops
plugins.description: Certified PM/Scrum craft + DevOps (install/upgrade/back up OpenProject via Docker slim) + driving the project lifecycle through an OpenProject MCP server. Communicates outward via an a2adapt identity.
